description_long: This house features a rectangular floor plan with a mix of stone and plaster exterior walls, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The structure includes several rooms, visible through large window openings and interior wall divisions, with a prominent stone facade on one side. The windows are irregularly placed, providing natural light to different sections of the house, and the roof appears flat, suitable for urban environments. The main entryway is set into the stone facade, likely accessed from street level, and is simple without elaborate decorative elements. The interior layout suggests a single-story design with open living spaces and private rooms toward the back. The overall look is practical and functional, with a blend of modern and rustic materials.
description: A single-story house with a flat roof, stone and plaster exterior, irregular window placement, and a simple main entryway set into a stone facade.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the main entryway, interior room divisions, and a mix of stone and plaster walls.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof, large window openings, and the stone facade.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the broad stone facade with the main entryway and minimal window openings, giving a sense of the house's width.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the interior layout with visible room separations and a clearer view of the plastered walls and window placements.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry set into a stone facade, no porch or decorative elements
